title: Weekly Paid-Ads Optimization
description: Run one brand's weekly paid-ads optimization loop as a trace. Faithful lift of coreyhaines31/marketingskills (MIT, 50+ marketing skills): this week's account numbers fan into five parallel diagnoses (ad-creative, customer-research, analytics, ads, cro), fan in to a single bottleneck via marketing-psychology's Theory of Constraints, become weighted candidate experiments via ab-testing's hypothesis + ICE framework, get scoped into a test (ab-testing), turned into creative + landing variants (ad-creative + cro), shipped with a launch + tracking checklist (ads + analytics), and written back to the playbook (ab-testing's Experiment Playbook + product-marketing's context doc). This is the GROW loop: the hypothesis node reads an accumulated memory.md (the lift of product-marketing's .agents/product-marketing.md), so over weeks its output stops being generic marketing advice and becomes this brand's paid-ads playbook — it explicitly skips candidate experiments already ruled out by prior weeks' learnings.

weekly_data.name: Weekly Data
weekly_data.does: Parse this week's account pull into structured metrics: CTR / CVR / CPA by channel, audience signals, competitor moves, pacing vs. budget.

diag_copy.name: Diagnose Copy
diag_copy.does: Analyze creative: which ad/headline angles are winning vs. fatiguing, and what the CTR drop says about the message.

diag_audience.name: Diagnose Audience
diag_audience.does: Read the audience signals: which segments / lookalikes are converting, where intent is decaying, what JTBD the movers map to.

diag_timing.name: Diagnose Timing
diag_timing.does: Read delivery timing, frequency, and attribution: dayparting, fatigue/frequency caps, and whether platform CPA is inflated vs. blended.

diag_channel.name: Diagnose Channel
diag_channel.does: Compare channel economics (Meta vs. Google: CPM/CPC/CPA) and read competitor moves that explain auction pressure.

diag_funnel.name: Diagnose Funnel
diag_funnel.does: Run a CRO read of the post-click path: value-prop clarity, headline match, CTA, trust, and friction that depresses CVR.

problem_tree.name: Problem Tree
problem_tree.does: Fan in all five diagnoses; apply Theory of Constraints to name the ONE binding bottleneck this week and rank the rest.

hypothesis.name: Hypothesis
hypothesis.does: From the bottleneck AND the accumulated brand memory, generate 3 ICE-weighted candidate experiments — skipping anything memory already ruled out.

ab_setup.name: A/B Setup
ab_setup.does: Pick the top 1–2 experiments and design the test: variable, primary/secondary/guardrail metrics, sample size, duration, allocation.

variant_gen.name: Variant Generation
variant_gen.does: Produce the control vs. treatment assets: ad creative (angle/headlines/specs) and the matching landing-page changes.

launch_plan.name: Launch Plan
launch_plan.does: Assemble the launch checklist and the analytics instrumentation (events, UTMs, conversions) needed to read the test cleanly.

memory_writeback.name: Memory Writeback
memory_writeback.does: Append this week's decision and the experiment-playbook entry to memory.md so next week's hypothesis is even more brand-specific.

deliverable.description: This week's paid-ads decision: the chosen test design + creative/landing variants + a launch & tracking checklist, the memory-informed hypothesis that shows the brand-specific reasoning, and the updated brand playbook (memory.md) that carries the learning into next week.
